title: rootlessport: use x/sys/unix instead of syscall
body:
Dup2 is not defined on arm64 in the syscall package.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/5587

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
/hold cancel
Special testing is not blocking right now, I believe.
